# chore(phase-01): seed workspace + /analyze shard 1

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `35d003c8ceee` — chore(phase-01): seed workspace + /analyze shard 1

**Body**:

Phase 01 MVP /analyze runs in PARALLEL with Phase 00's external
gates (trademark / board / counsel / launch-time §B re-runs).
ROADMAP §33 strict reading would hold /analyze until gates close,
but the gates are days-to-weeks of clock time and non-blocking on
architectural analysis — the architecture is largely robust to
trademark mark variation. Per autonomous-execution.md "Default to
maximum parallelization", running analysis concurrently with
external gates is the optimal sequencing.

This commit is shard 1 of an estimated 25-shard /analyze (per the
shard plan in 01-analysis/01-shard-plan.md). Shard 1 is
foundational: it seeds the workspace, derives the brief from
authoritative Phase-00 sources (no greenfield user prompt exists —
Envoy is Foundation-stewarded, scope is locked in ROADMAP +
CHARTER + DECISIONS + 37 frozen specs), maps the inheritance from
Phase 00, plans the remaining 24 shards, and seeds the journal
with the bridge-pattern guidance.

Shard-1 artifacts:

- briefs/00-phase-01-mvp-scope.md — derived brief; the single
  source the rest of /analyze chases. Lists Phase 01 surfaces,
  components, exit criteria, inheritance, out-of-scope, hard
  invariants, external-gate carryover.

- 01-analysis/00-inheritance-from-phase-00.md — frozen-contract
  surface map. What Phase 01 may NOT change (37 specs, 9 ADRs,
  vocabulary, BETs); inheritable analysis docs / plans; what
  Phase 01 produces NEW; cross-spec invariants Phase 01
  implementation must hold; an inheritance-audit shell snippet.

- 01-analysis/01-shard-plan.md — 25-shard sequence with
  per-shard capacity check, dependency graph, parallelization
  groups, and failure-mode mitigations. Shard 1 ≈ this commit;
  shards 2–3 unblock the deep-dive shards 4–19; shards 20–22
  aggregate; shards 23–24 redteam to convergence; shard 25
  closes /analyze.

- journal/0001-CONNECTION-phase-00-to-phase-01-bridge.md — the
  non-obvious methodology pattern: Phase 01 /analyze docs MUST
  cite Phase 00 artifacts by path + section, never paraphrase.
  Re-derivation looks like rigour but costs (a) direct re-work,
  (b) drift risk, (c) MUST-Rule-5b 37-sibling re-redteam.

No specs/ touched. No frozen-contract artifact edited. Phase 00
workspace stays sealed at convergence.

Next entry point: shard 2 (mvp-objectives + USP refinement). The
shard plan's §2 carries the running checklist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
